app.name: Duolingo: Language Lessons
app.summary: Duolingo helps people practice a new language through short vocabulary, translation, listening, speaking, reading, and writing exercises.

supportedClaims.text: Practice a new language with vocabulary, translation, and listening exercises.
supportedClaims.source: Reviewed App Store description and approved app screens

supportedClaims.text: Build language skills with short guided exercises.
supportedClaims.source: Reviewed App Store description and approved app screens

proofs.label: Vocabulary choice exercise
proofs.detail: A Spanish vocabulary question asks the learner to choose the correct translation for the glass.

proofs.label: Sentence translation exercise
proofs.detail: A guided Spanish translation exercise asks the learner to assemble the sentence I want a salad.

proofs.label: Listening exercise
proofs.detail: A listening exercise asks the learner to type the Spanish phrase they hear.

styleNotes: Keep claims within the reviewed language-practice evidence
